history.content: Are there any pet related products?

payload.message:
Yes, there are several pet-related products in the catalog. These include:

1. Kennel Rubber Dumbell With Bell - Small Rubber Rubber Toy For Dog (Pet Supplies > Toys > Comfort Toys)
2. Sicons All Purpose Tea Tree Dog Shampoo (200 ml) (Pet Supplies > Grooming > Skin & Coat Care > Shampoo)
3. Sicons Conditioning Conditoner Dog Shampoo (200 ml) (Pet Supplies > Grooming > Skin & Coat Care > Shampoo)
4. Sicons All Purpose Arnica Dog Shampoo (500 ml) (Pet Supplies > Grooming > Skin & Coat Care > Shampoo)

All these products are for dogs.
